response_profile.summary: Barracks tutors and reserve lenses go forward to keep the relay chain in order.
Signal crews reset braziers, palisades, and road screens along the route.
Drum crews and ditchers patch the post and keep marsh scouts in cadence.
Relay engineers reset lenses and watch crews so the array can call reserve fire again.
Wardens relight the sanctum and reopen blessed road markers for the nearby line.
Totem scribes relight the shrine so couriers can follow marked reeds through the fog.
Sanctum keepers relight the lenses and realign the reserve routes under the array.
Foresters and escorts keep the mill road open for reserve wagons.
Quarry crews fortify the switchback so ore carts can keep moving.
Peat crews stake the reed road and reopen a safer recovery line.
A fresh watch crew keeps signal fires lit through the next raid window.
Lantern crews sweep the fog line and signal hostile sails before they close.
Boatwrights and escorts make the crossing reliable enough for reserves.
Winch crews brace the lift and post sentries on both landings.

items.name: Wayfarer Infirmary
items.service_summary: A field surgeon treats the command retinue and records lessons from the march.

items.name: Market Caravanserai
items.service_summary: Caravans exchange coin for mixed construction lots on a weekly cycle.

response_profile.summary: Woodcutters mark a defended forest road for steady beam wagons.
Sluice crews keep the floodplain pay channel open under escort.
Pit crews brace the switchback and keep ore carts moving.
Assayers tally reef salvage and guard the coastal pay chest.
Cinder crews shutter hot seams and reopen the ore road.
Cutters flag a snow-safe haul route for seasoned whitewood beams.
Surveyors record a future rare-resource source without adding it to live stockpiles.

Press crews keep relay canvas, rope, and messenger seals ready.
Linked saw crews keep controlled yards supplied with straight-cut beams.
Kiln tenders dry coastal stores and keep return routes serviceable.
Local levy clerks rotate orchard watch crews and wagon teams.
Annex crews sort usable bloom and reinforce armor stores.
Charter clerks stabilize payrolls and pressure-road contracts.
Crews sort dust and toll coin under a guarded badlands awning.
Underway crews shore the ore face and guard cart lifts.
Planters and cutters maintain a short-haul beam grove near the road.
